name: reviewer-affiliation cache treats an entry older than twenty-four hours as expired and refreshes it on next lookup
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache && printf '{"login":"alice","org":"a","fetched_at":"2026-05-11T00:00:00Z"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/affiliation-cache/alice.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/affiliation-lookup.sh" --login alice --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --cache-ttl-hours 24 2>out.txt && grep -q 'cache_status=expired' out.txt && grep -q 'refreshed=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
